calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Property And Exhibits A-D
Off Calendar Oct-01-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: William Devine for and with Lindsay Burgess (Trustee).

The Court stated that it has no problem with the Wells Fargo accounts, but it has no information on the Chase account. Mr. Devine stated that it turns out the Chase account was a line of credit and there is nothing there. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Property is granted as to the Wells Fargo accounts and denied as the Chase account (subject to the order being reviewed and revised).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Property And Exhibits A-D
Off Calendar Aug-03-2018 Advanced From Aug-28-18 To Aug-15-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Property And Exhibits A-D
Off Calendar Aug-15-2018 Continued To Sep-26-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: William Devine for and with Lindsay Burgess (Trustee).

The Court stated that it needs some evidence that the bank accounts were held by the Decedent at the time the Trust was created, and that it saw the supplement which supports two of the bank accounts at Chase Bank numbers 1656 and 2193, but it is not sure it has evidence to support the other accounts. The Court also stated that the blank checks do not tell the Court that the Decedent had those accounts on the date the Trust was created. Mr. Devine stated that the Trustee reports that the banks are very unwilling to disclose any information about what's in those accounts or even if they are open, and asked would there be anything short of a statement that would be acceptable and if the Court would be willing to grant the petition with respect to the two Chase Bank accounts. The Court explained that it can't tell what would or would not be acceptable without having the evidence before it, and that it is willing to bifurcate the petition and grant it as to the two Chase bank accounts. Mr. Devine is to prepare an order. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Property is continued to September 26, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 as to the remaining four bank accounts.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Notice Of Ex-Parte Petition And Ex-Parte Petition For Order Advancing Hearing Date On Petition For Order Confirming Trust Property And Exhibits A-D
Off Calendar Aug-03-2018 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Property And Exhibits A-D
Off Calendar Jul-24-2018 Continued To Aug-28-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
